{{Quote|The ULF is a name, that's all. I made it up! The Upland Liberation Front is a make believe bogey on which to blame every raid ambush and theft and petty sabotage and I don't know what all.|[[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] to [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Shatterpoint (novel)">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
The '''Upland Liberation Front''' (or the '''ULF''') was a name created by [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She did this to represent the groups of [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] raiding the [[Balawai]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Summertime War]]. It was not really a group, just a name meant to intimidate the Balawai; it had no formal organization, command structure, or even a rank system. The [[Akk Guard]]s were one of the ULF's few organized units.
